title: Andrew Fan
text: Home * People * Andrew Fan Andrew Fan , a British software development engineer, M.Sc. in CS from University of Essex in 1994, and former system analyst at Motorola Semiconductors Hong Kong Ltd. [1] . As computer chess programmer, Andrew is author of the chess engines KKFChess and FireFly . He is further involved in the parallel search framework of Dirty [2] , and has written the TLCS/TLCV clients WBROG and REGO [3] . Forum Posts [ edit ] New chess engine - FireFly 1.0.0 by Andrew Fan , Winboard Forum , May 18, 2004 KKFChess 2.6.3 and FireFly 1.0.2 released by Andrew Fan , Winboard Forum , May 30, 2004 32-bit Magic experiments by Andrew Fan , Winboard Forum , December 03, 2009 » Magic Bitboards , Kindergarten Bitboards External Links [ edit ] Andrew Fan | LinkedIn FireFly's Home page References [ edit ] ↑ Andrew Fan | LinkedIn ↑ 48th PT 2015 Leiden: List of participants ↑ FireFly's Home page including WBROG and REGO ( Wayback Machine , 2017) Up one level
